title: GenAI Interview Prep
description: Structured question banks, scenarios, practice sessions, and mock tests for GenAI, AI engineering, data science, and architecture interviews.

topics.title: AI Fundamentals
topics.description: Core AI, ML, and GenAI concepts every candidate should be able to explain clearly.

topics.title: LLM Fundamentals
topics.description: Transformers, tokenization, context windows, alignment, hallucinations, and model tradeoffs.

topics.title: Prompt Engineering
topics.description: Prompt patterns, structured outputs, function calling, context design, and prompt security.

topics.title: Embeddings & Vector Databases
topics.description: Embeddings, similarity search, ANN indexes, hybrid retrieval, metadata filtering, and vector database tradeoffs.

topics.title: RAG Fundamentals
topics.description: Retrieval pipelines, chunking, reranking, grounding, citations, and RAG evaluation.

topics.title: Advanced RAG
topics.description: Query rewriting, multi-hop retrieval, Graph RAG, agentic RAG, context compression, ACLs, and multi-tenant retrieval.

topics.title: Agent Fundamentals
topics.description: Tool calling, planning, reflection, memory, agent loops, safety, and human-in-the-loop patterns.

topics.title: Multi-Agent Systems
topics.description: Supervisor patterns, specialist agents, planner-executor designs, communication, debugging, and anti-patterns.

topics.title: MCP & A2A
topics.description: Model Context Protocol, tool integration, agent-to-agent communication, discovery, governance, and security.

topics.title: LLMOps & Evaluation
topics.description: Prompt/version management, evaluation sets, groundedness, observability, cost, latency, drift, and feedback loops.

topics.title: Statistics for Data Science
topics.description: Probability, distributions, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, A/B testing, sampling, and correlation.

topics.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
topics.description: Classical ML algorithms, evaluation metrics, model selection, leakage, and production tradeoffs.

topics.title: Feature Engineering
topics.description: Feature selection, encoding, scaling, leakage, missing data, time features, and embedding features.

topics.title: ML System Design
topics.description: Recommendation, fraud, ranking, batch and real-time inference, feature stores, registries, and monitoring.

topics.title: Enterprise GenAI Architecture
topics.description: Multi-tenant platforms, access control, governance, observability, cost, and reliability.

topics.title: GenAI System Design
topics.description: Design problems for enterprise assistants, document intelligence, AI search, coding assistants, memory, and evaluation platforms.

topics.title: Architect Rounds
topics.description: Architecture tradeoffs, platform strategy, reliability, observability, governance, vendor selection, and cost.

topics.title: Leadership Rounds
topics.description: AI ROI, stakeholder alignment, adoption, governance, risk, vendor management, team enablement, and business impact.

topics.title: Mock Interviews
topics.description: Role-specific warm-ups, deep technical questions, system design prompts, scenarios, and scoring rubrics.

topics.title: Cheat Sheets
topics.description: Concise revision prompts for LLMs, prompting, embeddings, RAG, agents, LLMOps, statistics, ML, and system design.
